SEARCH
Package entities

Class TimeSlotStatus

java.lang.Object
entities.TimeSlotStatus
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TimeSlotStatus extends Object implements Serializable
Entity class representing the availability status of a specific time slot. This DTO (Data Transfer Object) is used to transport availability data (time, capacity, occupancy) from the server to the client for UI rendering.
See Also:
